home.title: A personal site for artwork, writing, and whatever interesting thing comes next.
home.lede: This homepage is designed to feel welcoming rather than salesy. It can introduce your dad, show selected work, share thoughts and updates, and leave room for a future shop if that becomes useful.
home.panelText: Personal bio, portfolio, blog, events, and contact now. Marketplace later if it makes sense.
home.overviewTitle: Each main section now has its own page.
home.overviewText: This keeps the homepage light and gives every topic room to grow without turning the site into a long scroll.

overviewCards.title: Background, influences, and personality
overviewCards.text: Use the About page for biography, personal context, and the story behind the work.

overviewCards.title: Featured work and experiments
overviewCards.text: Give artwork, projects, or collections their own dedicated presentation space.

overviewCards.title: Thoughts, notes, and updates
overviewCards.text: Keep blog posts separate from the homepage so new writing can grow naturally over time.

overviewCards.title: Local appearances and happenings
overviewCards.text: Use the Events page for community updates, shows, talks, markets, and future appearances.

home.futureTitle: A marketplace can be added later without rebuilding the site structure.
home.futureText: For now the site stays focused on personality, work, writing, and community presence. If there is demand, a shop page or simple product section can be introduced later.

about.title: Introduce the person behind the work.
about.body: Use this section for a short biography, background, influences, and what kind of work or ideas visitors can expect to find here. Keep it conversational and grounded.

highlights.title: Personal story
highlights.text: Add a few sentences about your dad's background, interests, and what led him to create or share his work.

highlights.title: Creative range
highlights.text: Mention the kinds of artwork, experiments, writing, or projects he wants people to explore.

highlights.title: Local connection
highlights.text: Use this card for ties to the local community, exhibitions, events, collaborations, or places that matter to him.

contact.title: Make it easy to reach out.
contact.body: Use the contact area for inquiries, local opportunities, commissions, or general conversation. If a shop is added later, this section can stay focused on direct connection.
contact.note: Future option: add a shop page or simple product list if there is interest in selling work directly.

footer.text: A simple multi-page baseline for your dad's bio, art, writing, and events.
